programme.desc: Peppa spots a new playground! The children race over to it and discover that it's rather odd. Grampy Rabbit explains, this isn't a playground at all, he says: it's an exercise park.

programme.title: Tim Rex in Space
programme.desc: When Tim and Kai have a rare disagreement, they each try to find a new best friend.

programme.title: Stan & Gran
programme.desc: Grandad clears some caterpillars off his veg and safely puts them in a box for rehoming, but when Stan checks, all he finds is a strange object..

programme.title: Milo
programme.desc: Milo, Lofty and Lark become resident Cowboys for Farmer Tilly's Wild West Party. They need to put their skills to the test when Lofty scares the cows, causing a stampede into Milotown.

programme.title: Ben and Holly's Little Kingdom
programme.desc: After the disappearance of Mrs Fotheringill, the twins have had no playgroup to attend. Queen Thistle becomes their new teacher.

programme.title: Peppa Pig

programme.title: Odo

programme.title: Milkshake! Movers
